master_plan_metadata.title: Master Plan - Derived from One Ring Blueprint
master_plan_metadata.philosophy: Build the plan by building the plan - iterative, living document that evolves with implementation

phase_1.name: Blueprint Completion & Implementation Specifications
phase_1.description: Complete all missing implementation specifications to achieve 100% blueprint completeness. This is the foundation for all subsequent phases.
objectives: Complete API endpoint specifications (all endpoints, schemas, authentication)
Define complete data models (schemas, validation rules, relationships)
Document Azure Service Bus configuration (topics, queues, routing rules)
Document Azure Key Vault configuration (secrets inventory, access policies)
Document implementation details (algorithms, business logic, error handling)
Define testing specifications (test cases, integration tests, performance tests)
Document deployment details (infrastructure, scripts, rollback procedures)

P1-T001.title: Complete API Endpoint Specifications
P1-T001.description: Document all API endpoints for JARVIS Master Agent API, including request/response schemas, authentication, rate limiting, error codes, and versioning strategy
acceptance_criteria: All endpoints documented with full schemas

P1-T002.title: Complete Data Model Specifications
P1-T002.description: Define complete data models for all systems: workflows, R5 knowledge, helpdesk tickets, JARVIS intelligence, system status, user management, etc.
acceptance_criteria: All data models defined with schemas

P1-T003.title: Document Azure Service Bus Configuration
P1-T003.description: Complete documentation of Azure Service Bus architecture: all topics, queues, subscription filters, routing rules, message schemas, retry policies, dead-letter handling

P1-T004.title: Document Azure Key Vault Configuration
P1-T004.description: Complete inventory of all secrets, access policies, secret rotation schedules, and integration points for Azure Key Vault

P1-T005.title: Document Implementation Details
P1-T005.description: Document detailed implementation specifications: algorithms, business logic, error handling strategies, performance requirements, scalability considerations

P1-T006.title: Define Testing Specifications
P1-T006.description: Create comprehensive testing specifications: unit tests, integration tests, end-to-end tests, performance tests, security tests, test data management

P1-T007.title: Document Deployment Details
P1-T007.description: Complete deployment documentation: infrastructure as code, deployment scripts, rollback procedures, monitoring setup, health checks

risks.mitigation: Strict adherence to blueprint requirements, regular reviews

phase_2.name: Azure Infrastructure Integration
phase_2.description: Implement Azure Service Bus and Azure Key Vault integrations. Migrate all async communication to Service Bus and all secrets to Key Vault.
objectives: Complete Azure Service Bus infrastructure setup
Migrate all async communication to Service Bus
Complete Azure Key Vault infrastructure setup
Migrate all secrets to Key Vault
Verify all systems using Azure infrastructure

P2-T001.title: Complete Azure Service Bus Infrastructure
P2-T001.description: Set up Azure Service Bus namespace, create all topics and queues, configure subscriptions, set up routing rules, configure retry policies

P2-T002.title: Implement Service Bus Integration Module
P2-T002.description: Create Python module for Azure Service Bus integration: connection management, message publishing, message consumption, error handling, retry logic

P2-T003.title: Migrate JARVIS Communication to Service Bus
P2-T003.description: Migrate all JARVIS file-based communication to Azure Service Bus: escalations, intelligence feed, responses, workflow coordination
acceptance_criteria: All JARVIS communication via Service Bus

P2-T004.title: Migrate Lumina Communication to Service Bus
P2-T004.description: Migrate all Lumina async communication to Azure Service Bus: workflows, verification, R5 knowledge ingestion, helpdesk coordination
acceptance_criteria: All Lumina communication via Service Bus

P2-T005.title: Complete Azure Key Vault Infrastructure
P2-T005.description: Set up Azure Key Vault, create all secret categories, configure access policies, set up Managed Identity, configure audit logging

P2-T006.title: Implement Key Vault Integration Module
P2-T006.description: Create Python module for Azure Key Vault integration: secret retrieval, secret rotation, Managed Identity auth, caching, error handling

P2-T007.title: Migrate All Secrets to Key Vault
P2-T007.description: Identify all secrets in code and config files, migrate to Key Vault, update all code to retrieve from Key Vault, remove secrets from codebase

P2-T008.title: Implement Secret Rotation Automation
P2-T008.description: Set up automated secret rotation: rotation schedules, rotation scripts, notification system, rollback procedures

risks.mitigation: Gradual migration with backward compatibility, rollback plan
Audit all secrets, secure migration process, verify removal

phase_3.name: Core System Enhancements
phase_3.description: Enhance core systems with Azure integration, improve Master Feedback Loop, enhance R5 Matrix, strengthen defense architecture.
objectives: Enhance Master Feedback Loop with Azure integration

P3-T001.title: Enhance Master Feedback Loop with Azure
P3-T001.description: Integrate Master Feedback Loop with Azure Service Bus for all feedback aggregation, enhance with Key Vault for configuration secrets
acceptance_criteria: Master Feedback Loop using Service Bus
All feedback flowing via Service Bus

P3-T002.title: Upgrade R5 Living Context Matrix
P3-T002.description: Enhance R5 Matrix with Azure Service Bus for knowledge ingestion, improve pattern extraction, enhance API performance, add real-time updates
acceptance_criteria: R5 using Service Bus for ingestion

P3-T003.title: Strengthen Defense Architecture
P3-T003.description: Implement killswitch mechanisms for all systems, set up air gap capabilities, enhance privilege separation, improve transaction logging, verify all defense principles

P3-T004.title: Improve Workflow Orchestration
P3-T004.description: Enhance workflow processor with Azure Service Bus, improve droid routing, enhance verification system, optimize workflow execution

P3-T005.title: Enhance JARVIS Escalation System
P3-T005.description: Upgrade JARVIS escalation with Azure Service Bus, improve message handling, enhance intelligence feed, add real-time notifications

P3-T006.title: Upgrade SYPHON Intelligence Extraction
P3-T006.description: Enhance SYPHON with Azure Service Bus for data flow, improve extraction algorithms, enhance self-healing, optimize performance

risks.mitigation: Gradual rollout, feature flags, rollback procedures

phase_4.name: Multi-Platform Application Development
phase_4.description: Develop JARVIS multi-platform applications: Windows 11 Widgets, Desktop Application, Mobile Application, IDE Chat Interface.

P4-T001.title: Develop Unified JARVIS Master Agent API
P4-T001.description: Implement the unified API that all platforms will use: authentication, workflows, chat, R5 knowledge, helpdesk, intelligence, system status endpoints

P4-T002.title: Develop Windows 11 Widgets
P4-T002.description: Create Windows 11 widgets: Status widget, Workflow widget, @helpdesk widget, R5 Knowledge widget, Notification widget

P4-T003.title: Develop Desktop Application - Windows
P4-T003.description: Create Windows desktop application: dashboard, chat interface, workflow management, knowledge management, helpdesk interface, settings

P4-T004.title: Develop Desktop Application - macOS
P4-T004.description: Create macOS desktop application: port Windows app to macOS, adapt UI for macOS design guidelines, test on macOS

P4-T005.title: Develop Desktop Application - Linux
P4-T005.description: Create Linux desktop application: port to Linux, adapt for Linux distributions, test on multiple distros

P4-T006.title: Develop Mobile Application - iOS
P4-T006.description: Create iOS mobile application: dashboard, chat interface, workflow management, knowledge access, helpdesk mobile, push notifications

P4-T007.title: Develop Mobile Application - Android
P4-T007.description: Create Android mobile application: port iOS app to Android, adapt UI for Material Design, test on multiple devices

P4-T008.title: Develop IDE Chat Interface
P4-T008.description: Create IDE chat interface for Cursor, VS Code, Abacus: direct chat with JARVIS, code generation, workflow orchestration, knowledge query, escalation

risks.mitigation: Early testing, platform experts, gradual rollout
Load testing, performance optimization, scaling strategy

phase_5.name: Defense Architecture Implementation
phase_5.description: Implement comprehensive defense architecture: killswitches, air gap capabilities, privilege separation, transaction logging, update verification, learning boundaries.

P5-T001.title: Implement Killswitch Mechanisms
P5-T001.description: Implement verified killswitch for every system: killswitch API, killswitch verification, killswitch testing, killswitch documentation

P5-T002.title: Set Up Air Gap Capabilities
P5-T002.description: Implement air gap capabilities for critical systems: offline operation mode, data isolation, network isolation, air gap testing

P5-T003.title: Enforce Privilege Separation
P5-T003.description: Implement privilege separation: minimum necessary permissions, role-based access, permission auditing, privilege testing

P5-T004.title: Implement Comprehensive Transaction Logging
P5-T004.description: Implement transaction logging for all actions: logging system, rollback capability, audit trail, log analysis, log retention

P5-T005.title: Set Up Update Verification
P5-T005.description: Implement update verification system: update testing, verification process, rollback procedures, update documentation

P5-T006.title: Define Learning Boundaries
P5-T006.description: Define explicit learning boundaries: boundary definitions, boundary enforcement, boundary monitoring, boundary documentation

phase_6.name: Testing & Validation
phase_6.description: Comprehensive testing and validation: unit tests, integration tests, end-to-end tests, performance tests, security tests, user acceptance testing.

P6-T001.title: Execute Unit Test Suite
P6-T001.description: Run comprehensive unit test suite, fix failing tests, achieve 90%+ code coverage, document test results

P6-T002.title: Execute Integration Test Suite
P6-T002.description: Run integration tests, test all system integrations, fix integration issues, document integration test results

P6-T003.title: Execute End-to-End Test Suite
P6-T003.description: Run end-to-end tests, test complete user workflows, fix E2E issues, document E2E test results

P6-T004.title: Execute Performance Test Suite
P6-T004.description: Run performance tests, measure response times, test scalability, optimize performance bottlenecks, document performance results

P6-T005.title: Execute Security Test Suite
P6-T005.description: Run security tests, penetration testing, vulnerability scanning, fix security issues, document security test results

P6-T006.title: Execute User Acceptance Testing
P6-T006.description: Conduct user acceptance testing, gather user feedback, address user concerns, document UAT results

risks.mitigation: Early testing, continuous testing, prioritized fixes

phase_7.name: Deployment & Continuous Improvement
phase_7.description: Deploy all systems, set up monitoring, establish continuous improvement processes, maintain blueprint synchronization.

P7-T001.title: Deploy All Systems to Production
P7-T001.description: Deploy all systems using infrastructure as code, execute deployment scripts, verify deployments, document deployment process

P7-T002.title: Set Up Comprehensive Monitoring
P7-T002.description: Set up monitoring for all systems: health checks, performance monitoring, error tracking, alerting, dashboards

P7-T003.title: Establish Continuous Improvement Process
P7-T003.description: Set up continuous improvement: feedback collection, analysis, prioritization, implementation, measurement

P7-T004.title: Maintain Blueprint Synchronization
P7-T004.description: Ensure blueprint stays synchronized with actual system state: continuous sync, validation, updates, documentation

P7-T005.title: Establish Feedback Loops
P7-T005.description: Set up feedback loops: Master Feedback Loop integration, R5 knowledge aggregation, pattern extraction, continuous learning

parallel_opportunities: P2-T001 and P2-T005 can run in parallel
P3-T001, P3-T002, P3-T004, P3-T005, P3-T006 can run in parallel after P2
P4-T002, P4-T003, P4-T006, P4-T008 can start after P4-T001
P5 tasks can run in parallel

quality_assurance.blueprint_compliance: All implementations must comply with One Ring Blueprint
quality_assurance.defense_principles: All implementations must follow defense architecture principles

integration_points.one_ring_blueprint: Source of truth for all implementations

high_risks.mitigation: Strict adherence to blueprint, regular reviews, change control
Proof of concepts, early testing, expert consultation

medium_risks.mitigation: Early integration testing, API contracts, documentation
